title: Insulated Cooler Bag Waterproof Portable Lunch Bag 15L / 24L / 33L Large Picnic Bag for Shopping Car Office Camping Outdoor Travel Family Barbecues
features: Excellent thermal insulation: This insulated picnic bag features a high-quality, heat-resistant PEVA lining. It keeps your food fresh and at the right temperature: up to 10 hours hot and 14 hours cold. Ideal for all seasons.

24L Picnic Bag: The cooler bag measures 37 x 24 x 24 cm and has a capacity of up to 24 liters, perfect for taking food with you or for weekend shopping. The large front pocket offers space for items such as magazines, cell phones, or keys. Two side mesh pockets are ideal for drinking glasses or cutlery.

Waterproof and leakproof: The outer shell is made of 600D Oxford fabric, which is tear- and abrasion-resistant, ensuring a long lifespan for the thermal bag. The PEVA inner membrane makes the insulated bag 100% waterproof. Even if something spills, the mess can be wiped away with a damp cloth.

Easy to carry: This insulated lunch bag features an adjustable and removable shoulder strap as well as padded handles. You can carry it by hand or over your shoulder as needed, for optimal comfort on the go.

Multifunctional: The cooler bag is suitable for many everyday uses. It can be used as a portable cooler for camping trips or for transporting lunch to the office. Thanks to its large 24-liter capacity, it's also ideal for weekend shopping at the supermarket or barbecues in the park.
description: Product Description Keep Warm Keep Cold The insulated lining keeps your food and drinks warm for hours. Whether you need a hot lunch or a cold beverage, it keeps things hot for up to 10 hours and cold for up to 14 hours. Large Capacity This insulated bag boasts a spacious 24 liter interior, easily accommodating multiple lunchboxes, drinks, snacks, and everyday essentials. Perfect for family outings, picnics, shopping trips, and long journeys where extra storage space is needed. Water Proof The outer shell is made of 600D Oxford fabric, which is tear- and abrasion-resistant, ensuring a long lifespan for the thermal bag. The PEVA inner membrane makes the insulated bag 100% waterproof. Easy to Clean The leakproof PEVA lining is easy to clean, simply wipe off spills with a damp towel or tissue., keeping the insulated bag clean and ready for next use. Practical Storage Multiple pockets provide convenient storage for cutlery, napkins, condiments, and personal items. All items are organized and easily accessible, making your outdoor trips more enjoyable and efficient. Easy to carry This insulated lunch bag features an adjustable and removable shoulder strap as well as padded handles. You can carry it by hand or over your shoulder as needed, for optimal comfort on the go.
